_note: Proposed content/benefits/<slug>.json. Copy an existing content/benefits file as the real shape; fill from extracted-facts + sources. Start at status: needs_review. Never invent amounts/thresholds; put changing figures in amounts[] with effectiveFrom + source.
disclaimer: 本系統只幫你整理資料及估計，不代表政府已批准申請。最終批核以政府部門公佈為準。請以官方連結最新資料為準。
